scenario.name: Custom Inline Example
scenario.task_text:
Parse the JSON product data. Filter to products with stock > 0.
Count the number of available products (available_count) and
calculate the total value of available inventory (total_value =
sum of price * stock for each available product).

bricks.raw_response:
name: process_product_inventory
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 9 steps
inputs:
  raw_api_response: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_extract_json_from_str
  brick: extract_json_from_str
  params:
    text: ${inputs.raw_api_response}
  save_as: step_1_extract_json_from_str
- name: step_2_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_1_extract_json_from_str.result}
    key: stock
    value: 0
  save_as: step_2_filter_dict_list
- name: step_3_difference_lists
  brick: difference_lists
  params:
    a: ${step_1_extract_json_from_str.result}
    b: ${step_2_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_3_difference_lists
- name: step_4_map_values
  brick: map_values
  params:
    items: ${step_3_difference_lists.result}
    key: stock
  save_as: step_4_map_values
- name: step_5_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_3_difference_lists.result}
  save_as: step_5_count_dict_list
- name: step_6_map_values
  brick: map_values
  params:
    items: ${step_3_difference_lists.result}
    key: price
  save_as: step_6_map_values
- name: step_7_zip_lists
  brick: zip_lists
  params:
    a: ${step_6_map_values.result}
    b: ${step_4_map_values.result}
  save_as: step_7_zip_lists
- name: step_8_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${step_7_zip_lists.result}
    do_brick: reduce_sum
    item_kwarg: values
    static_kwargs: {}
    item_paths: {}
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_8_for_each
- name: step_9_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_8_for_each.result}
    field: result
    operation: sum
  save_as: step_9_calculate_aggregates
outputs_map:
  available_count: ${step_5_count_dict_list.result}
  total_value: ${step_9_calculate_aggregates.result}
bricks.dsl_code:
@flow
def process_product_inventory(raw_api_response):
    parsed          = step.extract_json_from_str(text=raw_api_response)
    out_of_stock    = step.filter_dict_list(items=parsed.output, key="stock", value=0)
    available       = step.difference_lists(a=parsed.output, b=out_of_stock.output)
    available_count = step.count_dict_list(items=available.output)
    prices          = step.map_values(items=available.output, key="price")
    stocks          = step.map_values(items=available.output, key="stock")
    zipped          = step.zip_lists(a=prices.output, b=stocks.output)
    per_product     = for_each(items=zipped.output, do=lambda item: step.reduce_sum(values=item))
    total_value     = step.calculate_aggregates(items=per_product.output, field="result", operation="sum")
    return {"available_count": available_count, "total_value": total_value}
